protocol.sandbox: Harbor EC2 provider, m7i-flex.large, ephemeral/delete enabled
protocol.reward_supervision: same-task; control never receives benchmark reward

reasons: 1 attempt per task (leaderboard requires >= 5 trials per task)
conformance.note: This is a mechanism/evolution study, not a Terminal-Bench 2.1 leaderboard submission. See the benchmarks README 'Protocol and limitations' section.

exclusions.reason: Reproducible upstream Codex 502 in the original run and 12 independent recovery sandboxes; treated as N/A across all four groups (not a score of zero).

raw_data.published_scope: derived-evidence only, committed in-repo under data/
raw_data.withheld: traces.jsonl (raw HTTP capture; request bodies carried provider account identifiers and auth tokens) and the support archive's operational configs/recovery-configs/runner-log
raw_data.rationale: credential and subscription-identifier hygiene; derived files reproduce every value in results.json (verified: 88 tasks and pass counts 68/70/67/73 per group)
